name: jujube
mechanism: Mechanism is not yet established with high confidence; reported activity is likely multi-component and may vary by extract chemistry and dose.
effects: folk medicine folk medicine folk medicine
interactions: Interaction evidence is limited; use caution with prescription medicines, especially CNS-active, anticoagulant, hepatotoxic, and blood-pressure/glucose-lowering drugs.
safetyNotes: Safety profile depends on species identity, preparation quality, dose, and co-medications; start low, avoid prolonged high-dose use without supervision, and stop if adverse effects occur.
